description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unreal publish that can be triggered manually with a required publish_version input. In an ubuntu-latest job, check out the repository, create a release asset by preparing files, downloading and extracting V8 binaries for Unreal Engine 4.24 and 4.25, then create a release with a tag and name based on the publish_version input. Upload two release assets: puerts.tgz and puerts_for_ue424_or_below.tgz.
